mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SIGNTRANSACTION( USERID, USERNAME, REGDATE, JUMINNO, SYSIP, SYSNAME, GUBUNCODE, TXCODE, PAGELANG, REGSITE, ENCSIGN, DELFLAG, REGDAY ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{regDate}, #{juminNo}, #{sysIp}, #{sysName}, #{gubunCode}, #{txCode}, #{pageLang}, #{regSite},
#{encSign, jdbcType=BLOB}, #{delFlag}, #{regDay} )
